Descryption: Ensure that the signs-ins after multiple failures report is reviewed weekly
Result: 0 failed sign-ins in the last 30 days
Recommencdation: Establish regular process of review 'Sign-in Failure' report (weekly, bi-weekly or monthly). Reviewing this report on a regular basis allows for identification and remediation of compromised accounts

Descryption: Ensure that the signs-ins from multiple geographies report is reviewed weekly
Result: 0 users signed in from multiple geographies in the last 30 days
Recommencdation: Establish regular process of review 'Sign-ins from multiple geographies' report (weekly, bi-weekly or monthly)  - Risky Sign-ins. Reviewing this report on a regular basis allows for identification and remediation of compromised accounts

Descryption: Ensure that the Azure AD roles are reviewed weekly
Result: 3 current directory role assignments exported for review
Recommencdation:
Establish regular process of periodic Access Review for all Azure AD roles. To define process, recommended is to use Privileged Identity Management Solution to configure recurring access review to revoke unneeded permissions over time

The recommendation is a part of Control ID: AAD.IM.02

Descryption: Ensure that the signs-ins from unknown sources report is reviewed weekly
Result: Risky sign-ins could not be retrieved automatically
Recommencdation: Establish regular process of review 'Sign-ins from uknown sources (for e.g. a TOR IP Address) - Risky Sign-ins' . Reviewing this report on a regular basis allows for identification and remediation of compromised accounts

Descryption: Ensure the list of external users that you have invited to documents is reviewed monthly
Result: 0 guest accounts exported for monthly review
Recommencdation:
Perform 'Access Review' process for external users that you have invited to documents stored on Sharepoint and OneDrive every '30' days

The recommendation is a part of Control ID: AAD.IM.04

Descryption: Ensure non-global administrators are reviewed weekly

Recommencdation:
Establish regular process of periodic Access Review for all Azure AD roles. To define process, recommended is to use Privileged Identity Management Solution to configure recurring access review to revoke unneeded permissions over time

The recommendation is a part of Control ID: AAD.IM.02
